extract: Rowlet (Japanese: モクロー Mokuroh) is a dual-type Grass/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation VII. It evolves into Dartrix starting at level 17, which evolves into Decidueye starting at level 34. In Hisui, it evolves into Dartrix starting at level 17, which evolves into Hisuian Decidueye starting at level 36. Along with Litten and Popplio, Rowlet is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Alola available at the beginning of Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon. They were the second Generation VII Pokémon to be revealed to the public on May 10, 2016, after Magearna. Rowlet is also one of the three first partner Pokémon of Hisui in Pokémon Legends: Arceus, alongside Cyndaquil and Oshawott.
